word: Quantum superposition is a fundamental principle of quantum mechanics.
definition: combination of multiple states

word: The patient was diagnosed with supraventricular tachycardia.
definition: abnormally rapid heart rate

word: Humans belong to the taxon Homo sapiens.
definition: A taxonomic group of any rank, such as a species, family, or class

word: In physics, a tensor is a geometric object that describes linear relations between geometric vectors, scalars, and other tensors.
definition: a mathematical object

word: Macbeth was the Thane of Cawdor.
definition: a man who held land by military service, ranking between an ordinary freeman and a hereditary noble

word: CT scans use X-ray tomography to create detailed images of the body.
definition: imaging by sections

word: Topology is a complex field of mathematics.
definition: a branch of mathematics

word: Many spiritual traditions seek to achieve a state of transcendence.
definition: the state of being or going beyond the limits of ordinary experience

word: The microphone acts as a transducer, converting sound waves into electrical signals.
definition: a device that converts energy from one form to another

word: The translocation of the endangered species was carefully planned.
definition: the act or process of moving something from one place to another

word: Tyrosine is an important amino acid in the human body.
definition: a nonessential amino acid

word: The doctor explained the function of the urethra.
definition: The tube that carries urine from the bladder.

word: Vanadium is used to make strong steel alloys.
definition: a hard, silvery-grey metallic element

word: The copyright information is usually found on the verso of the title page.
definition: the left-hand page of an open book, or the back of a single sheet

word: The politician's speech was full of vitriol against his opponents.
definition: cruel and bitter criticism

word: The volta in the sonnet marked a shift in tone.
definition: a turn or change, especially in poetry or music

word: The wali was responsible for the province's administration.
definition: an administrative governor or guardian in some Muslim countries

word: Fiber optics use a type of waveguide to transmit light signals.
definition: a structure that guides waves

word: She is studying the history and practices of Wicca.
definition: a modern pagan religion with roots in pre-Christian traditions

word: The brewer added hops to the wort before fermentation.
definition: a plant, especially a herbaceous one; the liquid extracted from the malt in the brewing process

word: He saw a pale wraith disappear into the mist.
definition: a ghost or ghostlike image of someone

word: The film perfectly captured the zeitgeist of the 1960s.
definition: the defining spirit or mood of a particular period of history as shown by the ideas and beliefs of the time.

word: A gentle zephyr rustled the leaves.
definition: A soft, gentle breeze.

word: The blacksmith will anneal the steel to reduce its brittleness.
definition: to heat and then slowly cool (metal or glass) to toughen it

word: The old train began to chuff slowly out of the station.
definition: To make a regular puffing sound, like a steam engine.

word: The team's logo was emblazoned on their new jerseys.
definition: to inscribe or display a design on something

word: Many immigrants were indentured servants in the colonies.
definition: To bind someone by an agreement as an apprentice or laborer

word: The strong winds threatened to rive the old flag.
definition: to tear apart or split

word: Her wit and charm scintillated throughout the evening.
definition: to sparkle; to emit flashes of light; to be brilliant and exciting

word: The hero vowed to smite his enemies.
definition: To strike with a firm blow; to affect suddenly and powerfully
